metadata.title: Latex Suite
metadata.description: Make typesetting LaTeX math as fast as handwriting through snippets, text expansion, and editor enhancements

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: The file or folder to load snippets from. The file or folder must be within your vault, and not within a hidden folder (such as .obsidian/).
ast.target: 从文件或文件夹加载片段。该文件或文件夹必须位于您的知识库中，并且不能位于隐藏文件夹（如 .obsidian/）内。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: e.g. \\dot{x}^{2} + \\dot{y}^{2} will display as \u1E8B\xB2 + \u1E8F\xB2, and \\sqrt{ 1-\\beta^{2} } will display as \u221A{ 1-\u03B2\xB2 }.
ast.target: 例如：\\dot{x}^{2} + \\dot{y}^{2} 会显示为 \u1E8B\xB2 + \u1E8F\xB2，而 \\sqrt{ 1-\\beta^{2} } 会显示为 \u221A{ 1-\u03B2\xB2 }。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: The file or folder to load snippet variables from. The file or folder must be within your vault, and not within a hidden folder (such as .obsidian/).
ast.target: 从文件或文件夹加载片段变量。该文件或文件夹必须位于你的知识库中，并且不能位于隐藏文件夹（如 .obsidian/）内。

ast.name: addHeading
ast.source: Highlight and color brackets
ast.target: 高亮和着色括号

ast.name: addHeading
ast.source: Math popup preview
ast.target: 数学弹窗预览

ast.source: Matrix shortcuts
ast.target: 矩阵快捷键

ast.name: addHeading
ast.source: Auto-enlarge brackets
ast.target: 自动扩大括号

ast.name: addHeading
ast.source: Advanced snippet settings
ast.target: 高级代码片段设置

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Obsidian Latex Suite: this plugin supports your IME keyboard, but
ast.target: Obsidian Latex Suite：此插件支持您的输入法键盘，但

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: is currently enabled. You may want to disable it in the plugin settings to fully enable automatic snippets. Be aware that this may cause unexpected snippet triggers while using your IME. To turn this warning off, enable
ast.target: 当前已启用。您可能需要在插件设置中禁用它，以完全启用自动代码片段功能。请注意，这可能会导致在使用输入法时意外触发代码片段。要关闭此警告，请启用

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to insert newline and indent latex-suite-insert-newline-and-indent
ast.target: 插入换行和缩进失败 latex-suite-insert-newline-and-indent

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error rendering math in tooltip:
ast.target: 工具提示数学渲染错误

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Reset to default snippets
ast.target: 重置为默认片段

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Remove all snippets
ast.target: 移除所有片段

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether snippets are enabled.
ast.target: 是否启用片段

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter snippets here.  Remember to add a comma after each snippet, and escape all backslashes with an extra \. Lines starting with "//" will be treated as comments and ignored.
ast.target: 在此输入片段。每个片段后加逗号，用 \ 转义反斜杠。"//" 开头的行忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to load snippets from a specified file, or from all files within a folder (instead of from the plugin settings).
ast.target: 从文件或文件夹加载片段

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to colorize matching brackets.
ast.target: 是否对匹配括号着色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When the cursor is adjacent to a bracket, highlight the matching bracket.
ast.target: 光标靠近括号时高亮匹配括号

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to display the popup preview relative to the equation source.
ast.target: 弹出预览相对于方程源显示

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to highlight the area within the nearest pair of brackets around the cursor in the popup preview.
ast.target: 高亮弹出预览中光标附近最近括号区域。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether auto-fraction is enabled.
ast.target: 是否启用自动分数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The fraction symbol to use in the replacement. e.g. \frac, \dfrac, \tfrac
ast.target: 替换中使用的分数符号，例如 \frac, \dfrac, \tfrac

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of environments to exclude auto-fraction from running in. For example, to exclude auto-fraction from running while inside an exponent, such as e^{...}, use  ["^{", "}"]
ast.target: 排除自动分数的环境列表，如 e^{...} 使用 ["^{", "}"]

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of characters that denote the start/end of a fraction. e.g. if + is included in the list, "a+b/c" will expand to "a+\frac{b}{c}". If + is not in the list, it will expand to "\frac{a+b}{c}".
ast.target: 表示分数开始/结束的字符列表。例如，若 + 在列表中，"a+b/c" 将扩展为 "a+\frac{b}{c}"；否则为 "\frac{a+b}{c}"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether matrix shortcuts are enabled.
ast.target: 是否启用矩阵快捷键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of environment names to run the matrix shortcuts in, separated by commas.
ast.target: 运行矩阵快捷键的环境名称列表，以逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether tabout is enabled.
ast.target: 是否启用 tabout。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of closing brackets for tabout, separated by commas.
ast.target: tabout 的闭合括号列表，以逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to automatically enlarge brackets containing e.g. sum, int, frac.
ast.target: 是否自动放大包含如 sum, int, frac 的括号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of symbols that should trigger auto-enlarge brackets, separated by commas.
ast.target: 触发括号自动放大的符号列表，逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Assign snippet variables that can be used as shortcuts when writing snippets.
ast.target: 分配代码片段变量，用作快捷方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to load snippet variables from a specified file, or from all files within a folder (instead of from the plugin settings).
ast.target: 从文件或文件夹加载代码片段变量（非插件设置）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Symbols that will be treated as word delimiters, for use with the "w" snippet option.
ast.target: 单词分隔符符号，用于"w"片段选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to remove trailing whitespaces when expanding snippets at the end of inline math blocks.
ast.target: 内联数学块末尾展开时移除尾随空格。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to also remove the closing $ when you delete the opening $ symbol inside blank inline math.
ast.target: 删除空白内联数学开头$时同时移除结尾$。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to suppress snippets triggering when an IME is active.
ast.target: IME激活时抑制片段触发。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether a warning is shown on startup if `Don't trigger snippets when IME is active` is enabled. Disable that setting if you are aware of the IME limitations. Currently only ios and android touch/swipe keyboards like gboard have support for IME. See https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/blob/main/DOCS.md#IME-keyboards for more info.
ast.target: IME设置启用时显示启动警告。了解限制可禁用。仅iOS/Android键盘支持。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Codeblock languages where the whole code block should be treated like a math block, separated by commas.
ast.target: 视为数学块的代码块语言，逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the level of debug information to log about snippet expansion. Set to "info" or "verbose" to help identify issues with snippet syntax or why a snippet is not expanding. Verbose mode will log most information to the developer console on debug level.
ast.target: 设置片段扩展调试级别："info"或"verbose"。Verbose模式记录详细信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: turn on/off vim keybindings. Note vim needs to be enabled in obsidian itself.
ast.target: 开启/关闭 vim 快捷键绑定。注意需要先在 obsidian 中启用 vim 功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
maps the key to switch from visual mode to select mode.
				 Keymap must be a vim keymap and can't contain any spaces. Use empty string to disable this feature.
				  (select mode=insert keybindings)
ast.target:
将键映射为从视觉模式切换到选择模式。
				 Keymap 必须是 vim 键盘映射，且不能包含任何空格。使用空字符串来禁用此功能。
				  (选择模式=插入键绑定)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
maps the key to switch from select mode to visual mode. 
				 must be a vim keymap and can't contain any spaces. Example <C-g><C-A-i> = Ctrl-g + Ctrl-Alt-i.
				 Please check the vim keybinding first on another command like w before reporting it. Some keybindings like shift don't work due to the original vim plugin. Use empty string to disable this feature.
				  (select mode=insert keybindings)
ast.target:
将键映射为从选择模式切换到视觉模式。
				 必须是vim的键位映射，且不能包含任何空格。例如 <C-g><C-A-i> = Ctrl-g + Ctrl-Alt-i。
				 请先在另一个命令如 w 上检查 vim 的键绑定，再报告此问题。某些键绑定（如 shift）由于原始的 vim 插件而无法正常工作。使用空字符串来禁用此功能。
				  (选择模式=插入键绑定)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
maps the key to the action of inserting a new line below while appending \\\\ to the current line in a matrix environment.
				 Use empty string to disable this feature.
ast.target:
映射键以在矩阵环境中执行插入新行的操作，同时在当前行末尾添加 \\\\。
				 使用空字符串来禁用此功能。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Make equations more readable by hiding LaTeX syntax and instead displaying it in a pretty format.
ast.target: 隐藏 LaTeX 语法，美化公式显示。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: LaTeX beneath the cursor will be revealed.
ast.target: 显示光标下的 LaTeX。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Disabled by default to not confuse new users. However, I recommend turning this on once you are comfortable with the plugin!
ast.target: 默认禁用，熟悉后启用。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: How long to delay the reveal of LaTeX for, in milliseconds, when the cursor moves over LaTeX. Defaults to 0 (LaTeX under the cursor is revealed immediately).
ast.target: 延迟显示时间（毫秒），默认为 0。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Can be set to a positive number, e.g. 300, to delay the reveal of LaTeX, making it much easier to navigate equations using arrow keys.
ast.target: 设为正数延迟显示，便于方向键导航。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Must be an integer ≥ 0.
ast.target: 整数 ≥ 0。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: When inside an equation, show a popup preview window of the rendered math.
ast.target: 公式内显示数学预览弹窗。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: The popup preview will be shown for all inline math equations, as well as for block math equations in Source mode.
ast.target: 显示所有行内及源码块公式预览。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Reset to default snippets
ast.target: 重置默认片段。

ast.name: setTooltip

ast.target: 移除所有片段。

regex.source: .setText("Make equations more readable by hiding LaTeX syntax and instead displaying it in a pretty format.")
regex.target: .setText("隐藏LaTeX语法，以美观格式显示公式，提升可读性。")

regex.source: .setText("LaTeX beneath the cursor will be revealed.")
regex.target: .setText("光标下方的LaTeX代码将显示出来。")

regex.source: .setText("Disabled by default to not confuse new users. However, I recommend turning this on once you are comfortable with the plugin!")
regex.target: .setText("默认禁用以防新用户混淆。但熟悉插件后，建议开启此功能！")

regex.source: .setText("How long to delay the reveal of LaTeX for, in milliseconds, when the cursor moves over LaTeX. Defaults to 0 (LaTeX under the cursor is revealed immediately).")
regex.target: .setText("光标移过LaTeX时，延迟多久显示代码（毫秒）。默认0毫秒（光标下的LaTeX立即显示）。")

regex.source: .setText("Can be set to a positive number, e.g. 300, to delay the reveal of LaTeX, making it much easier to navigate equations using arrow keys.")
regex.target: .setText("可设为正数（如300）延迟显示LaTeX，使用方向键导航公式时更顺畅。")

regex.source: .setText("When inside an equation, show a popup preview window of the rendered math.")
regex.target: .setText("在公式内时，显示渲染后数学公式的弹窗预览。")

regex.source: .setText("The popup preview will be shown for all inline math equations, as well as for block math equations in Source mode.")
regex.target: .setText("弹窗预览将显示所有行内公式，以及源代码模式下的块级公式。")
.setName("从文件或文件夹加载代码片段")

regex.source: .setDesc('A list of environments to exclude auto-fraction from running in. For example, to exclude auto-fraction from running while inside an exponent, such as e^{...}, use  ["^{", "}"]')
regex.target: .setDesc('排除自动分式功能的环境列表。例如，要在指数（如e^{...}）内禁用自动分式，可填写 ["^{", "}"]')

regex.source: .setDesc('A list of characters that denote the start/end of a fraction. e.g. if + is included in the list, "a+b/c" will expand to "a+\\frac{b}{c}". If + is not in the list, it will expand to "\\frac{a+b}{c}".')
regex.target: .setDesc('表示分式起止的字符列表。例如，若列表包含+，则"a+b/c"会扩展为"a+\\frac{b}{c}"；若不包含+，则扩展为"\\frac{a+b}{c}"。')

regex.source: .error(['Popper: "arrow" element must be an HTMLElement (not an SVGElement)
.error(['Popper: "arrow" modifier\'s `element` must be a child of the popper', "element."].join(" ")

.error(["Popper: The `allowedAutoPlacements` option did not allow any", "placements. Ensure the `placement` option matches the variation", "of the allowed placements.", 'For example, "auto" cannot be used to allow "bottom-start".', 'Use "auto-start" instead.'].join(" ")
regex.target: .error(["Popper：`allowedAutoPlacements`选项未允许任何位置。确保`placement`选项与允许位置的变体匹配。", '例如，"auto"不能用于允许"bottom-start"，请改用"auto-start"。'].join(" ")

regex.source: .error('PopperJS: an invalid property has been provided to the "' + modifier.name + '" modifier, valid properties are ' + VALID_PROPERTIES.map(function(s)
regex.target: .error('PopperJS：向"' + modifier.name + '"修饰符提供了无效属性，有效属性为 ' + VALID_PROPERTIES.map(function(s)

regex.source: .error(['Popper: "auto" placements require the "flip" modifier be', "present and enabled to work."].join(" ")
regex.target: .error(['Popper："auto"位置需要"flip"修饰符存在且启用才能生效。'].join(" ")

regex.source: .innerHTML=`What key to press to trigger ${t}. Should follow codemirror keymap syntax such as "Ctrl-k Ctrl-a". For more info see codemirror keymap documentation.`
regex.target: .innerHTML=`按下哪个键来触发 ${t}。应遵循 codemirror 键映射语法，例如 "Ctrl-k Ctrl-a"。更多信息请参见 codemirror 键映射文档。`

regex.source: .setDesc(`The symbol to use as the cursor in the popup preview such as ${G.mathPreviewCursor}. Leave it blank to turn it off.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`在弹出预览中使用的光标符号，例如 ${G.mathPreviewCursor}。留空则关闭此功能。`)
